examples: For him to win the game like that is a testament to his perseverance.
The only way to improve is through hard work and dogged perseverance.
Mr. Jobs also spoke of perseverance and will power.
Maxwell, an internationally recognized leadership expert, has some insight into the concept of perseverance.
Stick-to-itiveness is a real word and a handy noun coined in 1884, meaning dogged perseverance.
